stemHtml: You make a descent from a cruising altitude of FL370 to land at an airport with high humidity. Which of the following can be expected?

options.a: Your pitot tubes will become blocked.
options.b: Icing will appear on the wings when the OAT is below 0°C.
options.c: Icing may appear on the wings if the wing temperature is below 0°C.
options.d: Icing will appear on the wings when the fuel temperature is above 0°C.
